description: Paradise Kashmir 2 offers an unforgettable journey through the breathtaking landscapes of Jammu and Kashmir. Explore the serene beauty of Srinagar with its iconic Dal Lake, houseboats, and Mughal gardens, venture into the snow-clad peaks of Gulmarg for winter sports, discover the pristine meadows and glaciers of Sonmarg, and relax in the picturesque town of Pahalgam, known for its lush valleys and scenic treks. This tour promises a perfect blend of natural beauty, adventure, and cultural richness, making it an ideal escape for nature lovers and thrill-seekers alike.
name: PARADISE KASHMIR 2
